name: Poached Eggs Massena
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the artichokes by removing stems, most of the leaves, and scraping away the fibrous "choke" to expose only the disk-shaped heart. Rub the hearts with lemon juice. Cook in salted boiling water for about 8 minutes, then drain and refresh with cold water.
2. Prepare the Bérainaise sauce: In a heavy saucepan, combine dry white wine, tarragon vinegar, minced shallots, chopped fresh tarragon, white pepper, egg yolks, butter (1 stick), salt, and cayenne pepper. Reduce to 3 tablespoons, let cool slightly. Whisk egg yolks into the vinegar mixture over low heat until thick like mayonnaise. Add warm melted butter in a thin stream. Season with salt, cayenne, and white pepper.
3. Poach 4 eggs for 3 minutes in 2 quarts of water plus 1 tablespoon wine vinegar.
4. To serve, arrange artichoke hearts on plates, spooning some Bérainaise sauce into each. Place a poached egg on top and drizzle with additional sauce.
------------------------------BEARNAISE SAUCE------------------------------
2/3 cup Dry white wine
1/3 cup Tarragon vinegar
3 tablespoons Shallots, minced
2 tablespoons Fresh tarragon, chopped
1/2 teaspoon White pepper
1/2 cup Unsalted butter (1 stick)
3 Egg yolks
Salt and cayenne pepper
